channel.title: PRAYZVIBES
channel.description: New music, release notes and selected stories from PRAYZVIBES.

item.title: Mountain Day arrives 31 July
item.description: A few hours. A mountain. A new perspective. Pre-save Mountain Day or discover it on Bandcamp.

item.title: Transience EP — 7 August 2026
item.description: Four songs about movement, memory, release and the quiet courage to keep going.

item.title: Exclusive Interview with PRAYZVIBES
item.description: Illustrate Magazine speaks with PRAYZVIBES about authenticity, healing, connection and the road ahead.

item.title: High Week
item.description: High Week is available on Bandcamp and streaming services worldwide.
